objective: Momentum sur ARBUSDC 15m. Indicateurs : Aroon + EMA + Volume Oscillator. Entrées : Aroon Up Cross > Aroon Down Cross, EMA direction ascendante, Volume Oscillator au-dessus de sa moyenne sur 5 périodes, confirmation inverse partielle du sentiment Fear and Greed index. Sorties : Sell quand le Aroon Down Cross le Aroon Up Cross avec un volume en baisse et un filtre de liquidité minimal de 0.8. Risk management : SL basé sur l'ATR multiplié par 2, TP basé sur une asymétrie long/short (TP plus élevé pour les positions longues).

iterations.hypothesis: Combining Aroon Up/Down crossovers with EMA direction and Volume Oscillator confirmation aims to capture momentum shifts while filtering out false signals and confirming volume participation in the move.

code.validation_error: [IND001] Usage invalide: indicators['volume_oscillator']['volume_oscillator'] — 'volume_oscillator' retourne un ndarray, pas un dict.
code.validation_error_retry: [AST001] Erreur de syntaxe ligne 83: unexpected indent

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The reliance on Aroon crossovers is prone to whipsaws, especially on a 15-minute timeframe. The Fear and Greed index filter is likely noisy and potentially adds lag. Volume oscillator confirmation might be redundant with the Aroon signals and could filter out valid trades. The liquidity filter is arbitrary and needs justification.
[Backup plan] If negative, simplify to just EMA crossovers and volume confirmation. If mediocre, optimize ATR multiplier and Aroon periods. If failing entirely, replace Aroon with a simpler momentum indicator like RSI or MACD and explore adaptive lookback periods.

iterations.hypothesis: Combining Aroon Up/Down crossovers with EMA direction and Volume Oscillator confirmation aims to capture momentum shifts while filtering out false signals during consolidation, and the exit logic adds a volatility filter to avoid premature exits.
